detail.notes: Operated by Goodwill of the Finger Lakes for the Rochester region. 24/7. Staffed routing line — NEVER auto-dial.
Rochester / municipal services routing. NEVER auto-dial.
Legacy SAMHSA suicide hotline. Still active, may route to 988. NEVER auto-dial.
Childhelp National Child Abuse Hotline. Staffed 24/7. NEVER auto-dial.
RAINN National Sexual Assault Hotline. Staffed 24/7. NEVER auto-dial.
National Domestic Violence Hotline. Staffed 24/7. NEVER auto-dial.
SAMHSA Disaster Distress Helpline. Staffed 24/7. NEVER auto-dial.
Trevor Project — LGBTQ youth crisis support. Staffed 24/7. NEVER auto-dial.
Trans Lifeline — peer support for trans people in crisis. Staffed 24/7. NEVER auto-dial.
NYS OASAS Confidential Hope Line — substance use, addiction, problem gambling. Staffed 24/7. NEVER auto-dial.
WomensLaw safe-exit hotline (VAW resource line). Staffed. NEVER auto-dial.
Emergency services. NEVER auto-dial under any circumstance.
24/7. Interpreters in 240+ languages. Staffed crisis line — NEVER auto-dial.
